data.title: House page template redesign — Jules to prototype layout with agent

data.body: Jules wants to redesign the house page layout — different overview format including related leader avatar badges. This is a prototyping task: Jules will work back-and-forth with an agent to iterate on the template. Depends on having the Mandelbrot badge and banner components finalized first. Blocked until Jules is ready to prototype.

## Key references for banner/badge Mandelbrot integration

**Mandelbrot SVG component:** Now vectorized (commit c23911b) at src/components/house/MandelbrotIcon.tsx — real potrace-traced paths, scales to any size, accepts color/size/opacity props.

**Single banner template (shows Mandelbrot placement in V-notch):**
/Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/2026-04-02/screenshot-untagged-2026-04-02-001.png
The Mandelbrot sits centered in the V-notch gap, OUTSIDE the colored banner area, on the cream page background. Small, muted gray.

**Raw SVG file:** public/images/mandelbrot.svg

When prototyping house pages, use the vectorized MandelbrotIcon — it's the canonical source now, not the PNG.
Blocked: task description says Jules needs to prototype interactively. Moving to needs_human until Jules is ready.
